description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsClaret (maroon) coloured all lace brassiere, has side shaping for additional support, non wired, high coverage, soft stretch lace, adjustable straps and adjustable double hook and eye closure at the backMaterial and Care78% nylon, 5% rayon and 7% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
